title: Canonical Property Profile
description: v1 of the one canonical property-profile contract (PRD section 32.3). All connectors, rules, scenarios, reports, and UI views must exchange this contract; modules may not invent competing property schemas. Every fact value carries a REQUIRED provenance_ref that must resolve to a provenance record in this profile (PRD sections 9 and 19; fix for M0-T004 G3 defect D1). Referential integrity of provenance_ref is enforced by .github/scripts/validate_contracts.py for fixtures and must be enforced by the backend for live data.

profile_version.description: Version of this profile instance (monotonic per property) plus the contract version used.

bins.description: Building Identification Numbers on the lot.

borough.description: Normalized borough display name (documented official spellings; see common.schema.json for grounding). Raw connector spellings are preserved in provenance original_value.

geometry.description: GeoJSON geometry of the lot. OPEN-WITH-FLAG: the full tax-lot geometry contract (CRS handling, polygon validity, geometry versioning) is deferred to the M2 tax-lot geometry tasks. Note from research (docs/research/M0-T002-geoclient-address-resolution.md section 2.6): Geoclient x/y are NAD83 New York-Long Island state plane in feet, lat/long are derived; the EPSG mapping is UNKNOWN from official pages and must be verified before geometry import.

lot_facts.description: Lot-level facts (area, frontage, depth, corner status, etc.). Material by definition: every fact value REQUIRES a provenance_ref (PRD sections 9/19).

existing_building_facts.description: Existing-building facts (floor area, stories, use, landmark status, etc.). Every fact value REQUIRES a provenance_ref.

zoning.description: Zoning districts, overlays, special districts, and mapped features. OPEN-WITH-FLAG: district-code enums/patterns are NOT modeled in v1 because the official zoning source family has not yet been researched (M0-T002 covered address/BBL/BIN only; Geoclient examples expose no zoning district designation field - research doc section 2.6). Free strings here must carry provenance; enum grounding is added additively when the M2 zoning-source research lands.

project_intent.description: User-selected development objectives for the analysis. Objective identifiers are finalized with the scenario-engine contracts (M5); PRD section 6 is the source list.

provenance.description: Source provenance records for every fact used (PRD section 9). Each record follows the canonical source_fact contract. Every fact_value.provenance_ref in this profile must equal some provenance_id in this array.

missing_inputs.description: Inputs the platform could not obtain, with criticality (PRD section 12 data-completeness).

conflicts.description: Cross-source conflicts detected for facts on this property. Conflicts must remain visible in results and reports (PRD sections 2/9).

resolution.description: PLATFORM-DEFINED enum (not a government-source value): grounded in PRD section 5 (user confirms/corrects), section 9 (user confirmed/overrode), and section 8 (official source priority order). 'source_priority' means the platform preferred the higher-priority official source and the conflict remains visible.

user_confirmations.description: User confirmations and overrides of official facts (PRD sections 5/9).

provenance_ref.description: REQUIRED id of the provenance record backing this fact (PRD section 19: a material calculation can never be exported without provenance). Must resolve to a provenance_id in this profile's provenance array.
